name: Betaflight RPM filter harmonic convention
note: Betaflight RPM filtering tracks per-motor RPM telemetry and filters motor-noise harmonics. For a three-blade prop, the third motor harmonic equals blade-pass frequency.

name: racingQuad current RPM filter frequency
note: Mirrors current preset RPM scale. Harmonic 3 equals blade-pass only for three-blade props.
